sub_modules.gd_poly_derivative: Combinational fixed-point derivative calculation for f'(x) = ((2*a*x) >>> M) + b.
sub_modules.gd_poly_alpha_scale: Combinational fixed-point multiplication of alpha by the derivative with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gd_poly_update: Combinational gradient descent update x_next = x_current - scaled_step.
